form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 5th of 7 at Sandown-Lakeside 3yo F Bm64 on March 25 over 1400m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Gold Coast Belle with 60kg at $9.50. Previously second-up 3rd of 9 at this track Mdn-Sw on October 17 over 1200m, slow going 0.9 len behind Katsumi Orochi carrying 55kg at $13. Plenty of improvement to come and a top contender.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation second last of 8 at Canterbury 3&4yo Bm68 November 19 over 1550m, 4.5 len behind Swift Legend carrying 57kg at $15. First up last campaign second last of 9 at Randwick Kensington F&M Bm72 October 8 over 1250m, 4.5 len behind Rubi's Serve with 57kg at $7. Prefer to see how she returns.
